label: Barbarian
description: An instinct-driven frontline destroyer built on rage, resilience, and physical dominance.

label: Bard
description: A charismatic support hybrid that mixes presence, trickery, and magic.

label: Cleric
description: A divine caster anchored in support, purpose, and control.

label: Druid
description: A primal shapeshifter or nature-caster rooted in instinct and natural balance.

label: Fighter
description: A disciplined martial specialist defined by training, durability, and battlefield reliability.

label: Monk
description: A mobile precision combatant focused on control, mastery, and technical execution.

label: Paladin
description: A sacred frontline protector combining oaths, support, durability, and judgment.

label: Ranger
description: A mobile hunter blending martial skill, wilderness instinct, and targeted pressure.

label: Rogue
description: A precision skirmisher driven by timing, mobility, pragmatism, and subtlety.

label: Sorcerer
description: An innate arcane force centered on instinctive magic, spectacle, and burst damage.

label: Warlock
description: A pact-bound or cursed caster shaped by outsider energy and dangerous bargains.

label: Wizard
description: A learned controller relying on logic, complexity, and deep arcane mastery.
